message:
docs: add GA4 env vars to .env.example

Documents the required GA4 environment variables with reference to
HashiCorp Vault storage location (secret/brennerbot).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,15 @@
+# =============================================================================
+# Google Analytics 4 (GA4)
+# Stored in HashiCorp Vault: vault kv get secret/brennerbot
+# =============================================================================
+# Public measurement ID (safe to expose client-side)
+NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID=
+# Property ID for admin API calls
+GA_PROPERTY_ID=
+# Measurement Protocol API secret (server-side only, keep secret!)
+GA_API_SECRET=
+
+# =============================================================================
 # Agent Mail (HTTP MCP endpoint)
 AGENT_MAIL_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8765
 AGENT_MAIL_PATH=/mcp/
